basic_details.job_title: IIM Sambalpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Faculty Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Sambalpur (IIM Sambalpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Sambalpur (IIM Sambalpur) Faculty Positions Notification 2026 has been released in May 2026 on the official website of IIM Sambalpur. A recruitment drive for various Faculty Positions has been announced through the IIM Sambalpur Faculty Recruitment 2026 under Advertisement No. ADVT/IIMSBP/2026/May/15.

age_limit.details: Professor of Practice on Contract: Maximum age limit is 65 years. Associate Professor of Practice on Contract: Maximum age limit is 65 years.

qualification.details: Professor: Ph.D. degree or equivalent, first class or equivalent at preceding degree, exceptionally good academic record. Minimum 10 years teaching/research/industry experience (at least 4 years at Associate Professor level in IITs, IIMs, IISc, IISERs, top 50 ranked B-schools or foreign universities). Successful track record of publications (at least three papers in A/A* or six in B, with at least two in A/A* in last 4 years). Professor of Practice on Contract: Substantial relevant experience of minimum 20 years with at least 5 years at a senior level in industry/government. Demonstrated understanding of and impact on practice. Interest and potential to teach LDP courses. Ph.D. desirable but not essential, must be offset by domain knowledge. First-class (Min 60%) or equivalent in Master's/Graduation and Class XII/X. Associate Professor: Ph.D. degree or equivalent, first class or equivalent at preceding degree, exceptionally good academic record. Minimum 6 years teaching/industry/research experience (at least 3 years at Assistant Professor level). Successful track record of publications (at least two papers in A/A* or four in B or eight in C, with at least one in A/A* in last 4 years). Publication requirement may be relaxed for industry experience. Associate Professor of Practice on Contract: Substantial relevant experience of minimum 15 years in industry/government. Demonstrated understanding of and impact on practice. Interest and potential to teach LDP courses. Ph.D. desirable but not essential, must be offset by domain knowledge. First-class (Min 60%) or equivalent in Master's/Graduation and Class XII/X. Assistant Professor (Grade-I): Ph.D. degree or equivalent, first class or equivalent at preceding degree, exceptionally good academic record. At least 3 years industrial/research/teaching experience (excluding Ph.D. pursuit). Publications in class A or B required for confirmation (may be relaxed for industry experience). Assistant Professor (Grade-II): PhDs with less than 3 years' experience may apply. Offered a contract position.

salary_details.details: Professor: Academic Level 14 A Professor of Practice on Contract: Consolidated Pay Associate Professor: Academic Level 13 A2 Associate Professor of Practice on Contract: Consolidated Pay Assistant Professor (Grade-I): Academic Level 12 Assistant Professor (Grade-II): Academic Level 10/11

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Sambalpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Sambalpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Faculty Positions at IIM Sambalpur?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Faculty Positions at IIM Sambalpur is 08 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different faculty positions available?
faq.answer: The available positions include Professor, Professor of Practice on Contract, Associate Professor, Associate Professor of Practice on Contract, Assistant Professor (Grade-I), and Assistant Professor (Grade-II).

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is a Ph.D. degree or equivalent in the discipline with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree and an exceptionally good academic record.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for the Professor of Practice positions?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit for Professor of Practice on Contract and Associate Professor of Practice on Contract is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary is based on the 7th CPC Academic Pay Levels, ranging from 10 to 14A, with specific levels for each post.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of IIM Sambalpur by the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting, followed by an interview and a research seminar.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any vacancies for Assistant Professor (Grade-II)?
faq.answer: Yes, PhDs with less than three years of experience may apply for Assistant Professor (Grade-II) on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
